occupation: International Account Director at Bauer Media Outdoor Europe
headline: International Account Director

experiences.title: International Client Manager
experiences.description:
• Successfully managed and implemented Out of Home multi-market international campaigns across 15+ markets.
• Expertise in developing and planning and overseeing campaigns with budgets
ranging from 1.5-3 million pounds, with a focus on strategic execution and maximizing ROI.
• Provide valuable assistance to international companies and agencies in creating effective marketing strategies, budgeting, and campaign planning
• Collaborating with internal teams to ensure smooth execution of projects for international clients, monitoring project progress, and ensuring timely delivery of services.
• Conducting market research and analysis to identify trends, competitive landscape, and opportunities for growth in international markets while providing regular reports on key performance metrics, analyzing data to identify areas for improvement, and making strategic recommendations to enhance the process
• Identifying opportunities for business growth and expansion within existing international client accounts, cross-selling or upselling products or services, and exploring new ways for collaboration.

experiences.title: Entrepreneurship Professor
experiences.description:
• Professor to a diverse group of over 100 students in the fields of innovation, business models, and impact assessment.
• Facilitated engaging class discussions and invited guest speakers from various start-ups and businesses across the country, providing students with real-world insights and perspectives.

experiences.title: Project manager and External Funds Coordinator
experiences.description:
• Successfully managed and implemented over 10 research projects involving various stakeholders, including NGOs, corporations, and governmental agencies.
• Proficiency in writing grant applications for international funds.
• Provided leadership to a team of 10+ staff members across Ecuador, overseeing the execution of 40+ education programs that catered to over 1000 international students.
• Through strategic efforts, achieved a 10% increase in annual sales, reaching a milestone of $4 million.

experiences.title: International Affairs Coordinator
experiences.description:
• Successfully managed and coordinated 83 research mobility initiatives with international partners, resulting in hosting over 130 campus visits per year. Cultivated strong relationships with university presidents, facilitating the expansion of new mobility programs by 150%.
• Pioneered USFQ's inaugural online faculty collaboration initiative, driving a 600% increase in local student participation in international programs. This achievement garnered a prestigious $24,000 grant from the US Embassy, enabling the development and training of over 500 professors from other Ecuadorian universities in this innovative methodology.
• Represented USFQ in international visits and events, playing a pivotal role in establishing strategic alliances with global partners.
• Effectively organized and executed the international travel agenda for the university president, ensuring seamless and productive international trips.
• Oversaw the comprehensive finance portfolio for the entire international office, including personalized programs, student/faculty mobility, and research initiatives.

experiences.title: Sustainability Executive
experiences.description:
•	Managed 200+ companies, working to change their business model towards the 2023 Agenda and a sustainable approach, growing the network 300%  
•	Launched and executed the networks first edition of Best Practices for Sustainable Development, Ecuador’s 1st sustainable practice event.  
•	Managed finance and administrative portfolio of the network

experiences.title: Political and Trade Intern
experiences.description:
• Work regarding  political issues in the embassy
• Support international trade between UK Businesses and the Ecuadorean sector 
• Event planning logistics and communications

experiences.title: Teacher Assistant
experiences.description: Worked as a Teacher Assistant of two professors, International Relations and Political Science. Regarding IR,  supported three courses.

experiences.title: Model United Nations Assistant and Tutor
experiences.description: Head delegate and tutor of the two courses regarding preparation for the National Model United Nations, the biggest international simmulation which takes place in New York. as head of delegation, we ontained the biggest recognition, outstanding delegation of the conference and best possition paper

experiences.title: Teacher
experiences.description: Preapare students for Model United Nations simulations, as an extracurricular activity. Main areas of work: Politics and government, current issues and history

experiences.title: Intern
experiences.description: Worked in the consular section of the embassy helping the mexican residents in Ecuador, directly as an assistant of the consul. Also collaborated in communications and logistics

education.school: The London School of Economics and Political Science (LSE)

education.grade: Maestría en Administración de Empresas con mención en Calidad y Productividad

education.activities_and_societies: Activities and Societies: Part of the Model United Nations team, representing both Russia and Turkey with the recognition of Outstanding delegation. Assistant of two  IR professors
